title: Tesollo commercializes its lightweight, compact robotic hand for humanoids
description:
Tesollo said its DG-5F-S robotic hand supports precise grasping and manipulation motions required for humanoid robots.

The post Tesollo commercializes its lightweight, compact robotic hand for humanoids appeared first on The Robot Report.
content:
